seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLING HEADPHONES - Balancing sound quality, style and comfort, the Rhythm Wireless Headphones are made for music lovers and feature Active Noise Cancelling that levels up any audio experience when relaxing at home or on the move

WIRELESS OR WIRED - The Rhythm headphones can be enjoyed wirelessly by connecting to any Bluetooth-enabled devices from smartphones to laptops to tablets, or connect directly via the 3.5mm audio jack for uninterrupted listening (audio cable included)

DYNAMIC SOUND WITH SUPER BASS - Enjoy audio the way you're meant to thanks to responsive 40mm drivers that deliver a powerful, dynamic sound with a punchy bass and clear, natural vocals. Balanced sound for a complete listening experience

32 HOURS WIRELESS PLAYBACK - A long battery life gives you plenty of time to enjoy your music, audiobooks, podcasts, or chosen audio with crystal clear sound for up to 32 hours with every full charge. Charges with the included charging cable

DYNAMIC DESIGN - The Rhythm headset is designed to bring you beats no matter where you are. The headphones can fold easily to allow for quick storage and simple travel and feature a hands-free microphone with on-ear controls for calls on the go
description: From the manufacturer Wireless Audio Playback (32 hours) Enjoy up to 32 hours of crystal-clear audio on a full charge, with charging via the included cable. Hands Free Microphone The hands-free microphone enables easy calls and voice assistant access with clear, reliable audio, whether at home or on the go. Voice Assistant The voice assistant lets you control your device hands-free, play music, adjust settings, and manage tasks with simple commands.
